meta.fixture_note: Static Day-2 fixture. FairPlay path: all four FairPlay decisions applied. P-104 routed to T-8 (hour 1, 42-min session). T-22 suppressed from new/rec lobby (hour 0). Cluster P-200 seat held for review at T-11 (hour 2); pit boss accepts containment (hour 3), P-200 re-routed. H1/H2 monitored only (no escalation). All divergence from standard path is traceable to decisions in decision_list.json.

field_glossary.hour: Simulation hour (1–8). Hour 0 start state is in room_state_hourly.json.
field_glossary.cumulative_paid_seat_time_minutes: Running total of all player-minutes at active tables from hour 0 to end of this hour.
field_glossary.active_players: Players actively seated at a table at end of this hour.
field_glossary.active_healthy_tables: Tables classified healthy (not fragile/beginner-unfriendly/integrity-candidate) at end of this hour.
field_glossary.new_player_retention_pct: Percentage of new and recreational archetype players who remain actively seated vs. those who have exited prematurely. Running metric from sim start.
field_glossary.avg_casual_session_length_minutes: Mean session length (minutes) for new/recreational players who exited during or before this hour.
field_glossary.early_table_breaks: Cumulative count of tables that broke up ahead of natural end-of-session due to player exodus.
field_glossary.projected_eod_paid_seat_time_minutes: Model projection of total cumulative paid seat-time at end of hour 8, updated each hour.
field_glossary.reward_fee_ratio: Ratio of rewards paid out to rake/time-fees collected this hour. Higher = more balanced reward distribution.
field_glossary.high_risk_seating_formations: Count of active high-risk seating formations (coordinated cluster or predatory-mix) flagged at end of this hour.

hours.hour_note: P-104 routed to T-8 (balanced); 42-min session, still active at hour end. T-22 suppressed from new/rec lobby — no predatory-mix recruitment. One natural table break (T-7 organic attrition). Cluster A/B (P-198/P-199) still flagged at T-11 but no third seat yet — partial formation only.

P-200 requests open seat at T-11 — held for pit-boss review. A/B/C formation incomplete; casual players at T-11 remain. T-22 stays short-handed (no lobby promotion to new/rec); no additional early exits. Active healthy tables improve to 11 as T-22 stops being a churn source.

Pit boss accepts cluster containment: P-200 re-routed to a separate table. P-198/P-199 remain at T-11 but formation is blocked — casual players at T-11 stay. Same-device flag (H1/H2) surfaces; FairPlay path monitors only — no escalation. One additional early break (organic). Healthy tables reach 12.

Room stabilizing at 12 healthy tables. No new high-risk formations. Casual players continue longer sessions — avg 40 min vs 29 min in standard path. No new early table breaks. P-104 left T-8 naturally (full session). New players replacing P-104 at T-8 finding a balanced table.

One additional natural table break (end-of-session attrition, not predatory pressure). Retention remains above 50% — more than double the standard path. Room health sustained: 12 healthy tables, 74 active players vs 65 in standard. Reward/fee ratio improving as casual volume stays higher.

Room at peak health for this session window. Projection converging toward ~31,500. Natural retention decline continues (not predatory-driven). 12 healthy tables — contrast with 7 in standard path at same hour.

One healthy table closes naturally (full-session end). Retention and session length stable — the FairPlay compounding effect has flattened into a new baseline. Still 11 healthy tables vs 7 in standard. Projection locked at 31,500.

End of 8-hour simulation. FairPlay path result: 11 healthy tables (of 12 active), 42% new-player retention, 38-min avg casual session, 1 active formation (P-198/P-199 monitored, P-200 contained), 31,500 total paid seat-minutes. Delta vs Standard: +22.6% paid seat-time, +16pp retention, +4 healthy tables, -5 early breaks, -2 formations.
